name: Google Currents
description: Discontinued Google application name used first for a social magazine reader (2011-2013) and later for an enterprise communication tool that replaced Google+ (2019-2023).

years.notes: Original Google Currents social magazine reader (2011-2013), discontinued November 2013 in favor of Google Play Newsstand. Circular swirl built from four overlapping gradient wedges flowing from teal (#5AE9C1) to deep blue (#0C53A5). Geometry transcribed verbatim from the Wikimedia SVG (viewBox 0 0 2496.86 2496.42), rescaled to 0 0 24 24 via a single scale(0.009612) group.

Enterprise Google Currents that replaced Google+ for G Suite (announced April 2019, public release July 2020, shut down July 5 2023). Stylized two-tone blue waveform — light Google blue (#4285F4) strokes with darker blue (#174EA6) diamond intersections. Geometry transcribed verbatim from the Wikimedia SVG (viewBox 0 0 277.5 283.1), centered into 24x24 via a translate(0.235 0) scale(0.0848) group.
